tools.name: createPortalUser
tools.description: Create a new portal user linked to a client and optional contact. Returns the user object without password hash.

tools.name: listPortalUsers
tools.description: List portal users for a client with activity information including last login.

tools.name: deactivatePortalUser
tools.description: Deactivate a portal user account. The user will no longer be able to log in.

tools.name: managePortalSessions
tools.description: List or revoke active portal sessions for a user.

tools.name: generateMagicLink
tools.description: Create a magic link for passwordless authentication. The link expires after the specified duration (default 15 minutes).

tools.name: validateMagicLink
tools.description: Validate and consume a magic link token. Returns the associated user ID if valid.

tools.name: listBriefRequests
tools.description: List brief requests submitted by clients, optionally filtered by client or status.

tools.name: reviewBriefRequest
tools.description: Review and update the status of a brief request. Can mark as REVIEWED, ACCEPTED, or REJECTED.

tools.name: convertBriefRequest
tools.description: Convert an approved brief request into an actual brief. The request status is set to CONVERTED.

tools.name: trackOnboarding
tools.description: Get or create the client onboarding status including progress percentage and task list.

tools.name: updateOnboardingTask
tools.description: Update the status of an onboarding task.

tools.name: listOnboardingTasks
tools.description: List onboarding tasks, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: addPortalComment
tools.description: Add a comment on a brief or approval in the client portal.

tools.name: listPortalComments
tools.description: List portal comments for a brief or approval, with pagination.
